text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
choice_data_list: You're looking a little under the weather.
You're looking a little under the weather.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I have a bit of a headache... It's been
raining a lot lately, so it may have something to
do with the air pressure...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...No, I can't be weak! I'll break that jinx and
cheer right—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
R-right... Ugh. Is there no way to get ahead of
nature?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Nnng... I'm sorry, but I might go lie down for a
bit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't like rain to begin with, so I'm sure the
weather is only making her headache worse.
Hopefully it clears up soon...
